Subject: INV-2024-0042 | Monthly Services - December 2023
body-plain:
Dear Accounts Payable,

Please find attached invoice INV-2024-0042 for monthly consulting services rendered in December 2023.

Invoice Details:
- Invoice Number: INV-2024-0042
- Invoice Date: January 15, 2024
- Amount Due: $4,250.00
- Payment Terms: Net 30
- Due Date: February 14, 2024

Payment Methods:
- ACH: Routing 123456789, Account 987654321
- Wire: SWIFT ABCDUS33, Account 11223344556677

Please remit payment by the due date to avoid late fees.

Thank you for your business.

Best regards,
Billing Department
Vendor Services Inc.
billing@vendor-services.com
+1 (555) 123-4567
